resources.title: CLAUDE.md 작성 및 프로젝트 컨텍스트 설정
resources.description: 프로젝트 루트에 CLAUDE.md를 만들어 기술 스택, 코딩 규칙, 금지 사항, 자주 사용하는 명령어를 정의하는 실습
resources.command: claude '이 프로젝트의 CLAUDE.md를 작성해줘. Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind, Supabase 스택, 함수형 컴포넌트만 사용'

resources.title: 에이전트 모드로 전체 기능 구현 위임
resources.description: Claude Code에게 인증 기능 전체(로그인·회원가입·JWT·미들웨어)를 한 번의 요청으로 자율 구현시키는 실습
resources.command: claude '이 Next.js 프로젝트에 Supabase Auth로 이메일 로그인·회원가입·세션 미들웨어를 완전히 구현해줘. 테스트도 작성해줘'

quiz.question: What is the purpose of the CLAUDE.md file in a project?
options: To define the project's technology stack and coding rules
To store all source code files
quiz.explanation: The CLAUDE.md file is used to define the technology stack, coding rules, and other important project guidelines.

quiz.question: How can Claude Code extend its functionalities?
options: By connecting to an MCP server
By integrating with third-party libraries only
quiz.explanation: Claude Code can extend its functionalities by connecting to an MCP server, allowing for greater tool integration.

quiz.question: What feature allows Claude Code to autonomously implement user authentication?
options: A single request for all authentication functionalities
Manual coding of each authentication method
quiz.explanation: Claude Code can autonomously implement user authentication features like login and signup through a single request.

practicePrompts.label: Agent Mode Exploration
practicePrompts.instruction: Explore the capabilities of Claude Code's agent mode.
practicePrompts.prompt: Demonstrate how to use the agent mode in Claude Code to generate a simple web application.
practicePrompts.followUp: Try adding a feature that allows user authentication.

practicePrompts.label: CLAUDE.md Setup
practicePrompts.instruction: Create a CLAUDE.md file for your project.
practicePrompts.prompt: Draft a CLAUDE.md file that outlines your project's tech stack and coding guidelines.
practicePrompts.followUp: Expand the CLAUDE.md to include common commands and prohibited practices.

practicePrompts.label: Git Integration Practice
practicePrompts.instruction: Integrate Git with your Claude Code project.
practicePrompts.prompt: Show how to set up Git for version control in your Claude Code project and commit your changes.
practicePrompts.followUp: Experiment with branching and merging in your Git setup.

evaluation.prompt: Paste your output, command result, or notes here and AI will evaluate whether your learning result matches the lesson goal.
evaluation.context: This learning topic is "Claude Code 마스터". Claude Code의 에이전트 모드, CLAUDE.md 설정, Git 통합, 멀티파일 작업까지 전문가 수준으로 활용하는 심화 과정
successCriteria: The learner completed a concrete practice step
The result matches the main lesson objective
The learner can explain or verify what happened
commonMistakes: Only reading the lesson without trying the practice step
Posting an incomplete command or partial result
Confusing setup issues with the lesson outcome
